description: Style NoteAdd a desi dimension to your global-glam ensemble with this lovely pair of earrings from royal diadem. A statement piece is a fashion essential - style this with minimal additional accessories for maximum effect. This pair packs a definite ethnic punch which means you can use this to dress up a simple salwar suit or a monochrome sari. Invest in this pair and you'll find that the statement jewellery trend will outlast the season. Product DetailsGolden coloured earring Mango shaped base with a green embedded in it and pearl like beadsDangler cutting through the base through a loopHook like dangler with white beaded detail and white bead hanging from the endPush back closureMaterial and CareMetalWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 65 mm
